text: Shipped the export fix this morning. It's live. Ping me if anything looks off.
Quick update. The migration's done. We dropped two old tables and the API's faster now. No downtime.
I read the doc. Two things don't add up. The retry logic loops forever, and the timeout's too short. Let's fix both before launch.
Thanks for the review. You're right about the naming. I'll rename it and push again tonight.
Heads up. The build broke on main. I reverted the last commit and it's green again. We'll dig into the real cause tomorrow.
Short version: it works, but it's slow. The query scans the whole table. I'll add an index and measure.
I don't think we need the cache yet. It adds risk and we're not at that scale. Let's wait until the numbers say so.
Got the demo working. It's rough but it makes the point. I'll clean it up before Friday.
